mapinfo.detailsText: Only an open terrain separates you from your enemies in the gorge. Above the ravine, beside the mountain, forests and many resources await those brave enough to take a path other than the central battle.
mapinfo.loadDetailsText: Only an open terrain separates you from your enemies in the gorge. Above the ravine, beside the mountain, forests and many resources await those brave enough to take a path other than the central battle.
